_comment: Active MCP servers for local Copilot Chat development. Pattern: scoped filesystem access + github integration.

_setup_notes.activation: Move or symlink this file to ~/.vs-agents/mcp/servers.json to activate. Example: ln -sfn servers.local.json servers.json
_setup_notes.github_token: Export GITHUB_TOKEN in your shell: export GITHUB_TOKEN=$(gh auth token)
_setup_notes.filesystem_scope: Restricted to dotfiles repo. Extend path in args array if needed for other workspace roots.
_setup_notes.workflow_alignment: Filesystem server enables local file inspection; github server enables repo/PR operations tied to validation gates.
